arguments.expression: window.trustedTypes = { createPolicy: function(name, rules) { return { createHTML: function(s) { return s; }, createScript: function(s) { return s; }, createScriptURL: function(s) { return s; } }; } }; window.chrome = { runtime: { onConnect: { addListener: function() {} } } }; var trustedTypes = window.trustedTypes; console.log('trustedTypes:', typeof trustedTypes); console.log('window.chrome:', typeof window.chrome); var policy = trustedTypes.createPolicy('test', { createHTML: function(s) { return s; } }); console.log('Policy works:', !!policy); 'Success'
